candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; useful as fallback across years.

variables.notes: Selected the direct revenue line first, with the duplicate total row as fallback priority.

candidates.why: Inventory change is only one component of cost of sales, not full COGS.
Explicit total cost of revenues / cost of sales line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total cost-of-revenues line as COGS.

candidates.why: Balance sheet reserve, not an income statement overhead expense.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly missed the correct concept. Chose income-statement overhead components from the A-column. Avoided 'Operating expenses' because in this statement it appears to be part of mining operating costs/COGS when combined with royalty, depreciation, and inventory change. Excluded depreciation/amortization, finance items, taxes, and totals/subtotals. Manual review recommended because some labels may be corporate overhead subcomponents that vary by year, and 'Travel' could be borderline. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Corporate administration, [Income Statement] Corporate social responsibility, [Income Statement] Investor relations, [Income Statement] Office and general, [Income Statement] Professional Fees, [Income Statement] Regulatory and transfer agent, [Income Statement] Salaries and benefits, [Income Statement] Stock-based compensation, [Income Statement] Travel

candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense line appears on the income statement. Exploration exists but is not necessarily R&D under this mapping.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; best match.
Finance-related expense fallback if interest expense is missing.

variables.notes: Used a priority list headed by the explicit interest expense row.

candidates.why: Only clear equity line available; no separate parent/owners equity line shown.

variables.notes: No separate parent equity / non-controlling interest lines are present, so Total Equity is used for BE.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line appears on the balance sheet; set to empty to avoid double counting with Total Equity.
